headline: Lululemon Founder Escalates Board Pressure After Shares Drop Nearly 70% Since 2024
summary: Chip Wilson warns CEO candidates governance issues may persist as Lululemon searches for new leadership.

headline: Lululemon Founder Escalates Board Critique Amid Ongoing CEO Search
summary: Lululemon Athletica founder Chip Wilson has cautioned prospective CEO candidates that the company’s challenges stem from its board rather than its leadership vacancy.

headline: Unveiling Lululemon (LULU) Q4 Outlook: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of Lululemon (LULU) for the quarter ended January 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks to Research Further
summary: Cash-generating companies often have the flexibility to invest, return capital to shareholders, or navigate downturns. The best of these businesses not only accumulate cash but deploy it strategically for growth.

headline: Chip Wilson to lululemon CEO Candidates: Beware a Board Unfit to Support Visionary Leadership
summary: Chip Wilson, Founder of lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) ("lululemon" or the "Company") and one of lululemon's largest shareholders, today issued a letter to leaders in the retail and apparel space who may consider becoming lululemon's next Chief Executive Officer.

raw.headline: Chip Wilson to lululemon CEO Candidates: Beware a Board Unfit to Support Visionary Leadership
raw.summary: Chip Wilson, Founder of lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) ("lululemon" or the "Company") and one of lululemon's largest shareholders, today issued a letter to leaders in the retail and apparel space who may consider becoming lululemon's next Chief Executive Officer.

headline: Lululemon Founder Chip Wilson Warns CEO Candidates: Fix The Board First
summary: Lululemon founder Chip Wilson warns CEO candidates to scrutinize the board before accepting the role. He's nominated three independent directors and is pressing for governance reform at LULU.

raw.headline: Lululemon Founder Chip Wilson Warns CEO Candidates: Fix The Board First
raw.summary: Lululemon founder Chip Wilson warns CEO candidates to scrutinize the board before accepting the role. He's nominated three independent directors and is pressing for governance reform at LULU.

headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Lululemon Athletica, Lowers Price Target to $250
summary: BTIG  analyst Janine Stichter   maintains Lululemon Athletica (NASDAQ:LULU) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $303 to $250.
